stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
When completing Item 9 of the ATS flight plan, if there is no appropriate aircraft designator, the following should be entered.

options.a: Insert "ZZZZ" and followed by an entry in ITEM 18 preceded by DEST/.
options.b: Insert "ZZZZ" and followed by an entry in ITEM 18 preceded by DEP/.
options.c: Insert "XXXX" and followed by an entry at ITEM 18 preceded by typ/.
options.d: Insert “ZZZZ” followed by an entry in Item 18.
